locationNotFound: Goobta lama helin — isku day erey raadin oo kale.
searchFailed: Raadinta way fashilantay — hubi xiriirkaaga oo mar kale isku day.
locationDenied: Ogolaanshaha goobta waa la diiday — kor ka raadi ama ogolow goobta si aad u hesho saldhigyo kuu dhow.
searchingNearby: Kuwa u dhow ayaa la raadiyaa…
stationCountFiltered_one: {{shown}} ka mid ah {{total}} saldhig oo ku jira {{distance}} {{unit}}
stationCountFiltered_other: {{shown}} ka mid ah {{total}} saldhigyo oo ku jira {{distance}} {{unit}}
noStationsFilter: Ma jiraan saldhigyo u dhigma filtarada la xushay.
showingCount: Waxaa la muujiyaa {{visible}} ka mid ah {{total}} — hoos u dhaadhac si aad u aragto intii ka hartay
errorTooManyRequests: Codsiyo badan oo xad-dhaaf ah — fadlan sug dhawr ilbiriqsi oo mar kale isku day.
errorServerBusy: Serfarka khariidaddu wuu mashquulsan yahay — fadlan mar kale isku day.
errorTimeout: Raadinta way ka baxday waqtiga — isku day aag yar ama mar kale isku day.
errorNetwork: Khalad shabakad — hubi xiriirkaaga oo mar kale isku day.
errorGeneric: Soo rarida saldhigyada waa fashilantay. Hubi xiriirkaaga.
